---
title: "Scaling"
author: "UIAO Modernization Program"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  html: default
  docx: default
  pdf: default
  gfm: default
---

# Regional Scaling Model

A primary goal of the **uiao-core** project is to eliminate "Configuration Drift." We achieve this by using immutable patterns defined in the **Appendix Canon Library**.

## One Pattern, Every Scale
Whether we are deploying a small regional office or a massive agency datacenter, the core logic (Identity, Addressing, Overlay, Telemetry) remains the same.

![Scaling Model](./images/regional_scale.png)

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![Architecture Diagram](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZLLTR-8m47pFhrXnqgbze2BGIbMbLWqfqLMY7shws9V5DjJ2iT7Yt1qwtNy_9q3YG8wK9xmxcHdFBk5-RP5idgbWlPHwXOGPp90j5sHopMEZ3C6tfFnu22xcc2kR66sVCHCGaKIV8I8oltOFX-DHT1LxpR4XBkX_NHBCebueSHgsSXvnqG7IndOW8cRbJsatfr6noLP62ss_QBt8fSFuASZUr4bCaV0fG9tZuJGdryaWcRHaUGGS9vUDiLTfTLBMYNL27z3Y3DTVyCdto9Of1DLzeNSMhLP2S_aROjH6V-XKbetKvCG4c3cyKsu_ptk0QvZA6I5jWbq8q7j5QmLfY6uWTOmSYODRSaS1t-6Hkpkv17hmnrUi1AF-82nfex2rFwu1m-2l3uaDYR9HV0bshg3VlziMAdifGoKA-QeINi2RM4YZKS7BV2wP-D1dQOPAGGa-Fp0xX0btppqRBjQbOjhm6i9ZEe5NeoJRRDk5qqfjwAdzo6TEwabmcMVjMk7WKEpjgQ5s2GdEIB86OjYqM_cH5MBaMnfTGBGGcctW8NP-faYkschdwiZEj7dtuR6TQSFDzR6RwSW79BdB_LqeaGdh1kXMY2sti4ldkJ7oSaPZGiq-jq7Nvw0OEjpUtlb5k06tICgH5k_StPxwXFl1kBbiSwhFDQ5Nx2GiVflCRRoWagy-rdHrhPtjtYs--tlv1m00)

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

### The Blueprint Approach
By referencing **Pattern A (Appendix A-01 / BA-01)**, we ensure that a security policy defined in the head-end is perfectly replicated at the edge switch, eliminating configuration drift across all deployment scales.
